[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00101000 2
1 00100000 1
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000000 a
7 00000100 1

01 10 00000010 1
12 21 01100010 3
23 32 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
34 43 00000100 1 match 7
45 54 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
56 65 00101000 2 match 0
67 76 00100000 1 match 1
70 07 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6

02 20 00000010 1
13 31 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
24 42 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
35 53 00011000 2
46 64 00000100 1 match 7
57 75 00100000 1 match 1
60 06 00001110 3
71 17 00100000 1 match 1

03 30 00011100 3
14 41 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
25 52 01100000 2
36 63 00001100 2
47 74 00000001 1
50 05 00011000 2
61 16 00100010 2
72 27 00100000 1 match 1

04 40 00000100 1 match 7
15 51 01100000 2
26 62 00100010 2
37 73 00000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
